ValidationRule.description: IS must enter a Risk Assessment during Approval Disable this rule as it is duplicated with the one in the trigger for approval
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL( Approval_Status__c , "Investor Services Approval"), ISPICKVAL( Preliminary_Risk_Assesment__c , ""), NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You must select a Preliminary Risk Assessment
